summary: Full-featured modern web application for SAID Raya Trip 2026 with family registration, summary statistics with charts, admin dashboard, and Excel export capabilities. Features minimal Raya theme with emerald green/gold accents, animated counters, real-time data sync, and secure admin access.
architectural_notes: Database table 'family_raya' stores nama_keluarga (text), makanan (text), ahli_keluarga (array), created_at (timestamp)
Admin authentication with secure route protection for dashboard access
Real-time data sync required across all tabs and views
Excel export generates multi-sheet workbook with raw data, summaries, and breakdowns
Animated UI elements: count-up counter (1s), fade-in cards, stagger animations (0.08s delay)
Color scheme: cream background (#FAF9F6), emerald primary (#0F5132), gold accent (#C6A75E)
Charts implementation: pie chart for food distribution, bar chart for family attendance

existing_features.title: Implement minimal Raya theme design system with soft cream background (#FAF9F6), emerald green primary color (#0F5132), soft gold accent (#C6A75E), clean modern sans-serif typography, elegant minimal spacious layout, and mobile responsive design with smooth subtle animations
Create top navigation bar with three tabs: 'Daftar Keluarga', 'Summary Raya', and 'Admin Dashboard' (admin only), with smooth fade transitions between tabs and thin gold divider line under header

Build Daftar Keluarga tab with centered card layout (max width 600px) containing family registration form with required fields: Nama Keluarga (text), Makanan Yang Akan Dibawa (text), and Bilangan Ahli Hadir (dropdown 1-20)

Implement dynamic member name fields in Daftar Keluarga form that appear with smooth slide-down animation when Bilangan Ahli Hadir is selected, generating text input fields labeled 'Nama Ahli 1', 'Nama Ahli 2', etc., with fade-in stagger animation (0.08s delay each) and all fields required

Implement form submission in Daftar Keluarga that shows loading spinner on submit button, saves family data to family_raya table, validates all required fields, and displays success message 'Data berjaya disimpan.' after successful save
Build Summary Raya tab with animated total attendees counter that counts up from 0 to total number of all ahli with 1 second duration

Create statistic cards section in Summary Raya displaying: Total Orang, Total Keluarga, Total Jenis Makanan, and Keluarga Paling Ramai, with fade-in animation, slight hover lift effect, and soft shadow
Create family cards layout in Summary Raya displaying each family with: Nama Keluarga, Total ahli, Makanan, and list of ahli names, with real-time updates
Implement charts section in Summary Raya with pie chart showing food distribution and bar chart showing number of attendees per family, both with smooth fade-in animations

Create secure admin authentication system with login page and protect admin routes so only authenticated admin users can access Admin Dashboard and perform admin operations (edit, delete, reset, export)
Build Admin Dashboard with editable data table displaying all families, search and filter functionality by family name, delete confirmation modal, and reset database confirmation modal

Create Excel export feature with 'Export Full Report' button that generates SAID_Raya_Trip_2026_Full_Report.xlsx containing three sheets: Sheet 1 'Raw Data' with columns Nama Keluarga, Nama Ahli, Makanan (one row per ahli); Sheet 2 'Summary' with Total Orang, Total Keluarga, Total Jenis Makanan, Keluarga Paling Ramai; Sheet 3 'Makanan Breakdown' with Makanan and Bilangan Keluarga Membawa columns
Implement real-time data synchronization across all views (Daftar Keluarga, Summary Raya, Admin Dashboard) so changes are reflected immediately without manual refresh

new_feature_requests.summary: Design system with minimal Raya theme (cream/emerald/gold colors, clean typography, mobile responsive)
Top navigation with smooth fade transitions between tabs (Daftar Keluarga, Summary Raya, Admin Dashboard)
Daftar Keluarga tab with family registration form (nama, makanan, dynamic ahli fields with animations)
Summary Raya tab with animated counter, statistic cards, family cards, and charts (pie/bar)
Admin authentication system with secure login and protected routes
Admin Dashboard with editable data table, search/filter, delete/reset modals
Excel export feature with 3 sheets (Raw Data, Summary, Makanan Breakdown)
Database setup with family_raya table (nama_keluarga, makanan, ahli_keluarga array, created_at)
Real-time data synchronization across all views
Create backend database table 'family_raya' with fields: nama_keluarga (text), makanan (text), ahli_keluarga (array of names), and created_at (timestamp)
Implement backend query functions to calculate and return: total number of attendees, total number of families, total unique food types, and family with most members for Summary Raya statistics
Implement backend functions for admin operations: update family record, delete family record, and reset entire family_raya database
